appTour.step1Text: This is your home screen. We pick the best workout for each day based on your schedule. Swipe the day strip to see upcoming days.
appTour.step2Text: Nutrition tracks your calories and macros. QR opens your check-in code to scan at the gym.
appTour.step3Text: Tap here to begin today's session. We'll suggest weights and reps based on your history — just follow along.
appTour.step4Text: Earn XP from workouts, PRs, and check-ins to level up. Complete the daily challenge for bonus points!
appTour.step5Text: All your workout routines and gym programs live here. Create custom routines or follow a structured program.
appTour.step6Text: The fastest way to begin. Shows today's workout with a big start button. Tap it when you're ready to train.
appTour.step7Text: Your workout history, body measurements, weight chart, and personal records — all in one place.
appTour.step8Text: See friends' activity, join gym challenges, and compete on leaderboards. Invite friends to earn bonus points!
appTour.step9Text: View your stats, achievements, goals, and gym info. Level up and unlock new achievement badges as you train.
appTour.step10Text: Hit this button anytime to start training. The app learns from every session to make your next one even better. Let's go!

firstWorkoutWelcome.autoGeneratedProgram: Your auto-generated program is waiting for you

coaching.title: AI Coaching Insights
coaching.plateau: Your {{exercise}} has stalled at {{weight}} lbs for {{weeks}} weeks. Try adding pause reps or switch variations for 2 weeks.
coaching.volumeUp: Volume is up {{pct}}% this week — great momentum! Keep pushing.
coaching.volumeDown: Volume dropped {{pct}}% this week — consider if you need a deload or if you're undertrained.
coaching.imbalance: You've trained {{highMuscle}} {{highCount}} times but {{lowMuscle}} only {{lowCount}} times in the last 4 weeks. Add more balance.
coaching.consistency: You hit {{completed}} of {{scheduled}} scheduled workouts this week — {{pct}}% adherence. Keep it up!
coaching.consistencyPerfect: Perfect week! You hit all {{completed}} scheduled workouts. Outstanding dedication.
coaching.prCelebration: New {{exercise}} PR: {{weight}} lbs! Keep that momentum going.
coaching.deload: You've been progressing for {{weeks}} straight weeks. Consider a deload week to optimize recovery.
coaching.streakChase: {{current}}-day streak! Your longest was {{longest}} — push for a new record.
coaching.streakRecord: {{current}}-day streak — you're on fire! Keep building.

bulk.messageHint: Each member will receive this as an in-app notification.
bulk.defaultMessage: Hey! We noticed you haven't been in for a while. We miss you — come back and crush your goals!

tenure.title: Tenure Milestones

tenure.hint: Checked daily by the churn scoring pipeline

digest.title: Weekly Digest
digest.description: Receive a weekly summary notification with new critical members, win-back returns, and top members needing attention.

followUp.defaultMessage: Hey! We noticed you haven't been in lately. We miss you — come back and crush your goals. Your progress is waiting!
